name: Slope Calculator
desc: Slope Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
description: Slope Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_description: Use our free slope calculator to quickly estimate slope, intercept based on x1, y1, x2. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate The slope to The points (0, 0) and (1, 1).
steps: Identify The coordenadas of The dos points
Apply The formula of slope: m = (y2 - y1) / (x2 - x1)
Calculate The intersección with The eje Y: b = y1 - m × x1
Calculate The distance between The points
mistakes: Divide per cero when x1 = x2 (línea vertical)
Invertir The orden of The coordenadas in The formula
